title: Research Assistant
description:
Company Introduction:‌

OREGENX is an innovative biotechnology company focused on organoid applications. We are dedicated to revolutionizing organoid technology and pioneering a new paradigm of precision medicine driven by patient-specific organoid models. By providing high-fidelity disease model sand drug-testing platforms, we enhance translational efficiency for pharmaceutical R&D and offer personalized therapeutic decision-making tools for clinical institutions. Our company has established a comprehensive organoid biobank covering multiple organ systems and diseases, continuously exploring the full value chain from drug screening to organ regeneration therapies. (http://oregenx.com/en)

Job Description:‌

We are seeking a Research Assistant to perform daily laboratory tasks related to human stem cell culture, direct differentiation and organoid application. This position is ideal for junior researchers embracing the translational application of regenerative medicine. Candidates areexpected to be highly motivated, possess strong communication and organizationskills. The successful applicant will have the opportunity to learn cutting-edgeorganoid and genome editing technologies and develop a promising career path.


Key Responsibilities:‌

1. Strictly adhere to laboratory Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and safety regulations to ensure a safe working environment for all laboratory users.

2. General administrative and laboratory duties, such as procurement, equipment and cleanroom maintenance.

3. Assist in maintaining the stem cell culture platform.

4. Perform molecular, cellular, biochemical and immunological analyses.

5. Contribute to the construction and management of organoid biobanks.

6. Faithfully document and present R&D procedures and data as required.

Qualifications:‌

1. A bachelor’s degree in biology, regenerative medicine, bioengineering, or a related field.

2. Highly responsible, self-motivated, resilient, and entrepreneurial, with a willingness to growalongside the company.

3. Hands-on experience in molecular and cell biology, including molecular cloning and cell culture, is preferred.

4. Experience in human stem cell culture is advantageous.

Candidates interested in this position are invited to send their resumes to HR@OREGENX.COM.

We regret that only short-listed candidates will be notified.
